TPP1.function: bridges POT1 to TIN2, recruits telomerase

telomerase.ALT_pathway: Alternative Lengthening of Telomeres — recombination-based, 10-15% cancers

ouroboric_telomere_endogenous.mechanism: Telomere loop closure as Frobenius-special parity (μ∘δ=id) with integer winding protection (Ω=𐑭)
ouroboric_telomere_endogenous.intervention: ONE-TIME: dCas9-TET2 mRNA + hTERT sgRNA LNP infusion
ouroboric_telomere_endogenous.intervention_target: hTERT promoter CpG island (30 CpG sites at 5p15.33)

L2_SIGNAL.mechanism: ATM → KAP1 phosphorylation → subtelomeric chromatin relaxation
L2_SIGNAL.output: Graded p53 (2–5× baseline) → p21 induction; sub-apoptotic

L3_DEREPRESS.mechanism: TET2 recruited to relaxed chromatin at 5p15.33

L4_EXPRESS.mechanism: Conditional hTERT transcription from poised promoter
L4_EXPRESS.hTR_TERC: Constitutively expressed from 3q26.2 — no modification needed

L5_EXTEND.mechanism: hTERT-hTR holoenzyme adds TTAGGG repeats to 3′ overhang

L6_TERMINATE.mechanism: G-quadruplex length sensor on extended 3′ overhang
L6_TERMINATE.ceiling: Overhang > 150 nt → G4 blocks telomerase access > 90%

L7_SEAL.mechanism: CST complex (CTC1-STN1-TEN1) + DNA Pol α fill-in C-strand
L7_SEAL.final_state: T-loop reformation via TRF2 — telomere indistinguishable from healthy baseline

safety_safeguards: Methylation memory: loop failure → re-silencing by DNMT1
ouroboric_telomere_endogenous.frobenius_closure: μ∘δ=id: Extension (δ) balanced by termination+sealing (μ) at homeostatic setpoint

rejuvenation_strategies.endogenous_ouroboric: Primary — one-time epigenetic trigger → life-long homeostatic telomere maintenance
rejuvenation_strategies.Yamanaka_factors_partial: OSKM pulsed expression (complementary, for epigenetic age reversal)
